title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 334.860 - Promulgation of rules, authority
text:
334.860.  Promulgation of rules, authority. — No rule or portion of a rule promulgated under the authority of sections 334.800 to 334.930 shall become effective unless it has been promulgated pursuant to the provisions of section 536.024.
(L. 1996 H.B. 999 § 7)
